step.title: Generate Controller Action Goals
step.rule: Step 3.17 (Fixtures) must have completed successfully before this step executes — action E2E tests need fixture data.
One goal per non-auth controller action (G-05). Auth endpoints are handled by a separate auth step (3.19) — never count them here.
All inputs are read from docs/architecture/* files and templates on disk — never from conversation context (G-16).

substep.title: Parse api-endpoints.md and filter auth
substep.action: Read docs/architecture/api-endpoints.md. Parse the file into two regions:

parse.region: All ### blocks under this heading are non-auth actions. Extract each ### {action_name} block with: action_name, http_method, endpoint_path, bc_name (from "Bounded Context" table cell), description, auth_required.
SKIP this entire section and all its sub-blocks. These are counted as N_auth_flows and handled by the auth goal step (3.19).

substep.action: As a secondary guard, also exclude any action whose name matches auth patterns (register, login, logout, password-reset, token-refresh) even if misplaced outside Auth Flows section.
Store the filtered list as ACTION_LIST. Record ACTION_COUNT = len(ACTION_LIST).
substep.rule: ACTION_COUNT must equal N_actions in the goal count formula (spec line 276) — non-auth actions only. This enumeration is unchanged: roadmap-only does NOT alter the goal count.

substep.title: Resolve depends_on for action goals
substep.action: Read goals.yaml from disk. For each action in ACTION_LIST, resolve depends_on from previously generated goal IDs:

dependencies.dep: Filter goals.yaml for phase=infrastructure where BC name matches this action's bc_name. Required — every action depends on its BC's infra layer being built.
Filter goals.yaml for phase=fixtures. Required — E2E tests need test data.
Filter goals.yaml for phase matching error-handling or cross-cutting with error-handling description. Required — E2E tests assert RFC 7807 error responses.
Filter goals.yaml for phase=auth. Required — protected endpoint E2E tests need auth infrastructure for 401/403 assertions.

Filter goals.yaml for phase=auth-bootstrap. For every action whose auth_required flag is true, add AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_GOAL_ID — the protected endpoint needs the security firewall/provider + User entity from the bootstrap goal. Skip for public (auth_required=false) actions.

substep.action: Collect these goal IDs into DEPENDS_ON array for each action: [own_bc_infra_goal_id, fixtures_goal_id, error_handling_goal_id] + all_auth_goal_ids + (AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_GOAL_ID when this action is auth_required).
substep.rule: If fixtures or error handling goal ID cannot be resolved, ABORT — prior steps did not run correctly.
Auth goal IDs may be empty if the project has no auth flows — that is valid. Infrastructure goal for the action's BC must always resolve.

AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_GOAL_ID is appended ONLY for auth_required actions. If no auth flows exist (3.16a skipped), there is no bootstrap goal and no action is auth_required — the append is empty, which is valid.

substep.title: Iterate and emit an action goal skeleton per action

per-action.action: Set ACTION_AREA = the directory of RESOLVE_CONTROLLER_PATH({bc_name}, {action_name}) (3.17.0, the single source of truth for controller paths) — i.e. the coarse controller directory contexts/{bc_name}/app/src/Http/Controller/ (or the projects/{app}/src/{Module}/ deployable-app dir when the discovery override applies). COARSE deliverable directory (the elaborator's tree-read anchor; it refines into the precise 5-file footprint — request/response DTO, controller, route, E2E test — at dispatch via the resolver against real files). NOT a per-file path, NOT a glob.
Call the goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: DEPENDS_ON from substep 3.18.2 (own BC infra + fixtures + error handling + auth goal IDs + AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_GOAL_ID when auth_required)

per-action.rule: Description format "{METHOD} {path} — {BC} controller action" ensures uniqueness (G-12) because paths are unique per endpoint.

Description must be ≤120 characters (MaxGoalDescriptionLength invariant). If the natural description exceeds 120 chars, truncate the path or BC name with ellipsis while preserving METHOD and key path segments.
max_retries=3 per G-11. phase=action on every created goal.

NO acceptance/validate/scope/context/investigation_config/not_in_scope params — roadmap skeleton; /tmux:elaborate authors PC-01..PC-17 (and the FRONTEND_MODE/Playwright deliverable set) at dispatch against the REAL tree (design §5/§6). NEVER run `tmux-cli rules match` here.

check.condition: goal-create returns error for any action
check.action: Print error with action name, endpoint path, and full context. ABORT — partial goal creation leaves an inconsistent state.
Print: "Controller action skeletons created: {{ACTION_COUNT}} goals (phase=action, status=roadmap)"
Verify: created goal count == ACTION_COUNT. If mismatch, print warning with expected vs actual counts.
